overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European-style town with timber-framed buildings. The character traverses a bustling market bridge, passes through a dark stone archway tunnel, crosses a crowded town square with a public gathering, and continues through narrow cobblestone streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge leading to market square with timber buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily across a wooden bridge toward a market area, passing pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking past Geralt toward the camera
pedestrian in yellow dress walking alongside the railing

entered.detail: wooden railings lining both sides of the bridge walkway
traditional half-timbered medieval houses with white plaster and dark beams
large wooden construction scaffold with vertical posts ahead on the path
wooden market stalls with goods displayed along the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a wooden bridge in a bright morning market area. Timber-framed medieval buildings line the path ahead, with a large wooden scaffold structure visible in the distance. Pedestrians in period clothing walk past in both directions, and market stalls line the left side of the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone archway tunnel connecting market to town square

events.description: enters dark stone archway tunnel from bright market area
lighting shifts to dim as Geralt moves deeper into the tunnel

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the enclosed stone tunnel toward the light at the far end

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking toward the camera through the tunnel

entered.detail: large stone archway tunnel with rough hewn walls creating a dark passage
rough stone block walls of the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed stone tunnel with rough walls blocking the sky. Geralt walks toward the bright exit visible at the far end, passing a pedestrian coming the opposite way. The timber buildings and market stalls of the previous area are now obscured by the tunnel walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with public gathering around wooden platform

events.description: exits tunnel into open town square with crowd gathered
crowd density increases significantly as Geralt approaches the central gathering

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town square, observing the crowd gathered around the central platform

notable_agents.action: preacher in red robes standing on wooden platform addressing the crowd
crowd of townspeople gathered in a semicircle facing the platform

entered.detail: open muddy town square surrounded by stone and timber buildings
large group of NPCs gathered in the center of the square
raised wooden platform with steps where the official stands
tall stone buildings with tiled roofs surrounding the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a bright town square where a dense crowd has gathered around a wooden platform. A figure in red robes stands on the platform addressing the townspeople. The ground is muddy and the square is surrounded by tall stone buildings. Geralt walks past the crowd toward the far side of the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with overhanging timber buildings

events.description: leaves open square and enters narrow street between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow street, passing under overhanging wooden structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tunic walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: confined cobblestone street with buildings close on both sides
tall timber-framed buildings with upper floors extending over the street
stone building with wooden external staircase leading to upper floor

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the town square and enters a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall timber-framed buildings with overhanging upper floors. The sky is partially visible overhead. A few pedestrians walk ahead, and a stone building with external wooden stairs appears on the left. The crowd and platform of the square are now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider street with mixed timber and stone architecture

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the wider street, approaching another archway in the distance

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near steps on the left side of the street

entered.detail: broader cobblestone street opening up between buildings
wooden cart with large wheels parked on the right side
stone archway entrance to another section of the town ahead

segments.scene_description: The street widens as Geralt continues forward, passing a wooden cart on the right and an armored guard on the left. Timber-framed buildings line both sides, and a stone archway entrance is visible ahead in the distance. The atmosphere remains that of a busy medieval town with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling medieval town, transitioning from an open market bridge through a dark tunnel and into a crowded town square. It begins with Geralt walking across a wooden bridge lined with market stalls and timber-framed buildings under bright morning light. As he moves forward, the open sky vanishes and the scene shifts into a dark, enclosed stone tunnel before emerging back into the light of a muddy town square where a crowd gathers around a figure in red robes. The camera then follows him away from the assembly and into a narrow cobblestone street flanked by overhanging timber buildings and external wooden stairs. Finally, the path widens to reveal a wooden cart and an armored guard, leading the way toward a distant stone archway.
